scripts.deps:ensure: node -e "const deps=['vue','vue-router','vue-i18n','pinia','vite','@vitejs/plugin-vue','vite-plugin-wasm','vite-plugin-top-level-await'];const missing=deps.filter((m)=>{try{return !require.resolve(m)}catch{return true}});if(missing.length){console.log('Missing deps:',missing.join(', '));process.exit(1)}else{console.log('All required deps present')}" || npm install --include=dev
